_comment: PROJECT-OWNED config for the shared java-angular pipeline. Source of truth for WMS-App-main, ALL THREE capabilities (Common, Transportation, Movements) in one combined, cross-linked run — see migration-pipeline.md 'Multiple source repos/modules' and source-triage.md. run.js has no config-path override — there is no sync-config.sh in this toolkit, so this file must be hand-edited back to a project's values before another project runs this pipeline. Backend-only: no Angular source exists for this project (CONFIRMED, PROJECT.md 2026-07-14), so angularSourceDir is intentionally empty.
